entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "मलाई सुरु गर्न मद्दत गर्ने एउटा प्रश्न सोध्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "अहिले अन्तिम उत्तर नदिनुहोस्। पहिलो कदम के होला भनेर म के सोच्छु, मलाई सोध्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "यो चरण किन काम गर्छ भनेर व्याख्या गर्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "मलाई सङ्केत दिनुहोस्, अन्तिम उत्तर होइन।"

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "मैले यो समाधान गरेपछि यस्तै अर्को समस्या दिनुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "यहाँ मेरो उत्तर छ। यसले कुन भ्रम देखाउँछ?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "यहाँ मेरो प्रयास छ। मद्दत गर्ने सबैभन्दा सानो सङ्केत के हो?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "यसपछि यस्तै अभ्यास समस्या बनाउनुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "तपाईं अघि बढ्नु अघि मलाई विचार फेरि आफ्नै शब्दमा बुझाउन लगाउनुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "यस विषयमा मलाई क्विज लिनुहोस् र मेरो उत्तर पर्खनुहोस्।"

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "मेरो गलत उत्तरसम्म कसैलाई कुन भ्रमले पुर्याउँथ्यो?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: सरल test

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: बलियो study loop यस्तो देखिन्छ:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AI ले तपाईंलाई छिटो सिक्न मद्दत गर्न सक्छ। यसले तपाईंलाई सिकाइबाट पूर्ण रूपमा बच्न पनि मद्दत गर्न सक्छ।

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: hint माग्नुहोस्। अहिले final answer नमाग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: सानो hint माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: AI लाई त्यो step check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: study session को अन्त्यमा आफैंलाई तीन प्रश्न सोध्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: पहिले प्रयास गर्नुहोस्। AI बिना तीन मिनेट प्रयासमा बिताउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: copy trap बाट बच्नुहोस्

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: loop बनाउनुहोस्

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: के म नयाँ example गर्न सक्छु?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: के म पछाडि नहेरी idea explain गर्न सक्छु?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: फरक learning jobs लाई फरक flows चाहिन्छ। hints का लागि homework coach, problem solving का लागि math step coach, deep understanding का लागि Socratic tutor, recall का लागि flashcards, र pressure-tested practice का लागि quizzes प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: के मलाई अब के practice गर्ने थाहा छ?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: आफ्नो move explain गर्नुहोस्। तपाईंले next step किन छान्नुभयो AI लाई भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: misconception fix गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: writing का लागि, यसको अर्थ Writing Coach प्रयोग गरेर आफ्नो voice राख्दै thesis, structure, वा paragraph improve गर्नु हो। code का लागि, यसको अर्थ complete solution paste गर्नुको सट्टा Code Tutor लाई errors explain गर्न, output predict गर्न, र debug गर्न सहयोग गर्न प्रयोग गर्नु हो। exams का लागि, यसको अर्थ Exam Prep Planner प्रयोग गरेर के पहिले review गर्ने र आफूलाई कसरी test गर्ने decide गर्नु हो।

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: इमानदार studying का लागि राम्रो prompts

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: यहाँ तपाईंले reuse गर्न सक्ने अलि बलियो version छ:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: आफैंलाई cheat नगरी AI सँग कसरी study गर्ने

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: answer yes हो भने AI ले तपाईंलाई study गर्न मद्दत गर्यो। answer no हो भने next move अझै reading होइन। active practice हो। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, वा AI learning prompt library खोल्नुहोस् र topic लाई तपाईंले attempt गर्नुपर्ने task मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: काम homework हो भने Homework Coach मा सुरु गर्नुहोस्। math हो भने Math Step Coach प्रयोग गर्नुहोस् र एक पटकमा एउटा step check गर्न भन्नुहोस्। concept गहिरो रूपमा बुझ्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भने Socratic Instruction प्रयोग गर्नुहोस् र summary माग्नु अघि questions answer गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: यदि तपाईं homework question paste गरेर final answer copy गर्नुहुन्छ भने task finish हुन सक्छ, तर skill बनेको हुँदैन। यदि तपाईं hint माग्नुहुन्छ, आफ्नो thinking explain गर्नुहुन्छ, answer compare गर्नुहुन्छ, र similar problem try गर्नुहुन्छ भने AI shortcut होइन study partner बन्छ।

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: नयाँ version practice गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: transfer practice गर्नुहोस्। फरक numbers, wording, वा context भएको similar problem माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: पछि recall गर्नुहोस्। weak spot लाई Flashcard Builder मा card वा Quiz Me On Trivia मा short quiz मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: diagnosis request गर्नुहोस्। तपाईंको answer ले understanding बारे के reveal गर्छ सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: अध्ययन सीपहरू

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: tool ले तपाईंलाई driver's seat मा राख्दा AI सँग studying सबैभन्दा राम्रो काम गर्छ।

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: त्यो warning sign हो। Recognition recall होइन। clear explanation पढ्नु भनेको new problem solve गर्न, paragraph लेख्न, वा pressure मा question answer गर्न सक्षम हुनु होइन।

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: त्यो loop copying भन्दा slower छ, तर confused रहनुभन्दा धेरै faster छ।

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: copy trap subtle हुन्छ। यो सधैं cheating जस्तो महसुस हुँदैन। कहिलेकाहीँ efficient भएको जस्तो लाग्छ। AI ले केही सुन्दर रूपमा explain गर्छ, तपाईं nod गर्नुहुन्छ, अनि अघि बढ्नुहुन्छ। दस minutes पछि answer अगाडि नभई idea reproduce गर्न सक्नुहुन्न।

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: difference तपाईं यसलाई कसरी use गर्नुहुन्छ भन्ने हो।

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: question AI studying को part हुनुपर्छ कि हुँदैन भन्ने होइन। धेरै learners का लागि यो पहिल्यै part हो। better question tool ले memory, judgment, र confidence build गर्न help गरिरहेको छ कि learning stick बनाउने exact struggle चुपचाप हटाइरहेको छ भन्ने हो।

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: transfer step key हो। यदि तपाईं AI ले भर्खर walked through गरेको exact problem मात्र solve गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ भने तपाईंले example सिक्नुभयो। यदि problem को cousin solve गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ भने idea सिक्न थाल्नुभएको छ।

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: यी magic words होइनन्। यी guardrails हुन्। तिनीहरूले conversation लाई answer collection को सट्टा thinking मा focused राख्छन्।

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: यी prompts ले तपाईंलाई active राख्छन्। तिनीहरूले AI लाई तपाईंको reasoning support गर्न लगाउँछन्, replace गर्न होइन।

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: यस्ता प्रम्प्टहरू प्रयास गर्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: समस्या आफैं प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: AI लाई सिकाइ चुपचाप हटाउने shortcut होइन, understanding, practice, र feedback का coach का रूपमा प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: उत्तर वरिपरिको thinking का लागि AI प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: AI लाई सुस्त हुन लगाउने prompts प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: सही mode प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: यो rule प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्: कुनै पनि AI explanation पछि आफ्नो दिमागबाट आएको output ले loop बन्द गर्नुहोस्। idea फेरि लेख्नुहोस्। नयाँ version solve गर्नुहोस्। flashcard बनाउनुहोस्। काल्पनिक सानो विद्यार्थीलाई सिकाउनुहोस्। quiz माग्नुहोस्। session ले तपाईंलाई जति बढी produce गर्न लगाउँछ, आफूलाई भ्रममा पार्ने सम्भावना उति कम हुन्छ।

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: आफ्नो next step लेख्नुहोस्।
